mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, compressing valuation multiples and driving negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are positive in >65% of months when FEDFUNDS rises.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden jump in the unemployment rate above 4.5 percent signals rapid labor market deterioration, triggering immediate risk-off capital flows and negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >55% of instances when UNRATE crosses the 4.5 percent threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates robust consumer demand, supporting corporate earnings growth and generating positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to produce positive 60-day returns in >60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a monetary tightening cycle reflects supply-side constraints that erode profit margins, leading to negative monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during tightening cycles yield positive 20-day returns in >50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: High policy rates combined with rising unemployment create stagflationary pressure that forces equity repricing downward over the next month as recession fears dominate.
failure_condition: The joint condition produces positive 20-day returns in >55% of triggered months.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth falling below 1.5 percent signals economic contraction, prompting immediate portfolio de-risking and negative weekly equity returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >60% of quarters where GDPC1 growth drops below 1.5 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls expands aggregate income and consumer spending capacity, driving positive quarterly equity returns through earnings growth.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth fails to predict positive 60-day returns with a Rank IC above 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising inflation outpacing policy rate hikes signals real rate compression and central bank lag, triggering equity sell-offs as future tightening expectations rise.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in >50% of months when inflation rises faster than policy rates.
